app.name: BAND-MAID Unofficial
app.description: A comprehensive fan app for BAND-MAID data — songs, releases, events, streaming stats, videos, live sets, and more. All data is sourced from public JSON files maintained and updated automatically on a daily basis.
app.author: DriveTimeBM

whatsNew.label: May 2026
items: Added Reactions Archive — 26,000+ fan reaction videos with playlist builder, grouped by channel or year
Added Translations view — 300+ English translations of Japanese interviews and articles
Added Interviews playlist builder — 550+ BAND-MAID interview videos with playlist save/load
Added Fan Cams playlist builder — 4000+ fan cam videos grouped by year, event, or channel
Added User Guide and Fan Tools views
Spotify Playlist now includes AutoHotkey autoplay script for hands-free playback
Calendar now shows countdown timers on event detail cards
URL bar added to app shell — shows direct link to current view with copy button

whatsNew.label: April 2026
items: Added Push to One Million view — track BAND-MAID videos approaching 1M views
Added YouTube Playlist builder with save/load/shuffle/loop
Added Spotify Playlist builder with save/load/shuffle
Calendar ticket links — Ticketmaster links matched to calendar events automatically

whatsNew.label: March 2026
items: Initial release of BAND-MAID Unofficial app
Core views: Songs, Releases, Videos, Spotify, Streaming, News, Calendar, Okyuji
App shell with mobile bottom nav and desktop sidebar
View generator tool for building custom views from JSON data

views.description: Upcoming BAND-MAID events and shows in a standard monthly calendar view. Events are color-coded and show local time alongside Japan Standard Time (JST). Overseas events with Ticketmaster listings include direct ticket purchase links.
tips: Click the Upcoming button in the header to jump directly to the next event
Click any event to see full details including a live countdown timer, location, and ticket links
Ticket links only appear for overseas shows sold through Ticketmaster — Japan shows do not use Ticketmaster
Times shown as your local time and JST side by side
The calendar auto-navigates to the month of the next upcoming event on load

views.description: Complete catalog of all BAND-MAID songs with detailed metadata. Includes Spotify stream counts, member quotes about each song, album associations, release dates, duration, and links to listen. One of the most data-rich views in the app.
tips: Use the search box to find songs by title, member, or album
Member quotes are displayed when available — not all songs have them
Spotify stream counts update weekly; not all songs are on Spotify
Filter by member to see which songs each member has commented on
Click any song card to see the full detail view including all quotes

views.description: Complete BAND-MAID discography including singles, albums, EPs, and live releases. Shows release dates, track listings, and catalog information.
tips: Sorted by release date newest first by default
Includes digital-only releases not always listed elsewhere
Track listings are included where available

views.description: All official BAND-MAID YouTube content with daily view count updates. Covers Official Music Videos, audio releases, live performances, shorts, and more. View count deltas show yesterday's views for each video.
tips: Sort by views, view delta (yesterday), or date
Type filter lets you focus on Official Music Videos, Audio, Live, etc.
ViewsDelta column shows yesterday's view count — useful for tracking trending videos
Direct links open the video on YouTube

views.description: All BAND-MAID songs available on Spotify, sorted by stream count. Shows Spotify rank, total streams, and YouTube rank for cross-platform comparison. Direct links to each song on Spotify.
tips: Songs are updated on a rolling weekly basis — not all update on the same day
Spotify Rank is relative to other BAND-MAID songs, not global
Compare Spotify Rank vs YouTube Rank to see which platform favors which songs
Use the search to find a specific song quickly

views.description: Links to BAND-MAID songs across multiple streaming platforms beyond Spotify, including Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, and others. Stream counts included where available.
tips: Not all songs are available on all platforms
Use this view to find songs on your preferred streaming service
Links open directly in the relevant streaming platform

views.description: Complete record of every BAND-MAID live performance (Okyuji) with full setlists. Links to setlist.fm pages for each show. Filter by year, venue, or song to find specific performances.
tips: Search by song name to find every show where that song was played
setlist.fm links let you add attended shows to your profile
Sorted newest first by default
Includes special events, overseas tours, and fan club shows

views.description: Interactive Google Map showing all BAND-MAID live performance locations worldwide. Filter by year or region to see tour patterns. Each pin links to the setlist and Google Maps directions.
tips: Zoom in to see clusters of shows in a city
Click a pin to see show details and setlist link
Useful for visualizing how BAND-MAID's touring has expanded internationally over the years

views.updateFrequency: As new content is added to BAND-MAID Prime
views.description: All BAND-MAID Prime live show videos, organized with full setlist details and timestamps. Jump directly to a specific song without scrubbing through the full video. Requires a BAND-MAID Prime subscription to watch.
tips: Click any song in the setlist to jump to that timestamp
Useful for rewatching a specific performance without searching through the full video
A TamperMonkey script is available in Fan Tools to add translation overlays while watching

views.updateFrequency: As new content is added to BAND-MAID Prime
views.description: All non-live BAND-MAID Prime content — documentaries, behind-the-scenes, member solo content, and more. Organized by category with tracklist details and timestamps where available.
tips: Covers all Prime content that is NOT a live show — use Live Video for live performances
Tracklists and timestamps make it easy to find specific segments
A TamperMonkey script is available in Fan Tools to add translation overlays

views.updateFrequency: As new content is added to Fan Club
views.description: All OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI (Fan Club) video content, organized with tracklist details and timestamps. Browse member videos, special content, and exclusive fan club releases. Requires a Fan Club subscription.
tips: Content is organized by category for easy browsing
Timestamps let you jump to specific segments
A TamperMonkey script is available in Fan Tools to add translation overlays while watching

views.description: Links to all OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI special photo galleries. Requires Fan Club membership to view the full images. Galleries are published periodically for special events.
tips: Gallery links open directly on the Fan Club site
Fan Club membership required to view full images

views.description: All BAND-MAID official news releases from bandmaid.tokyo, updated daily. Links to the full announcement on the official site.
tips: Sorted newest first
Links open the original Japanese announcement on bandmaid.tokyo
Use search to find news about a specific topic or date

views.description: Random photos posted by BAND-MAID and individual members (Akane, Kanami, Miku, MISA, Saiki) updated daily. A random selection is shown each day from the full collection.
tips: Filter by member to see photos from a specific member
A new selection is shown each day
Click any photo to see it full size

views.description: Live countdown clocks to the next two upcoming BAND-MAID events. When a YouTube video is within 24 hours of reaching a million views milestone, it is added to the countdown automatically.
tips: Updates every 10 minutes automatically
Shows both event countdowns and YouTube milestone countdowns
Countdown clocks tick in real time

views.description: Browse BAND-MAID-related content from across all of YouTube — fan reactions, covers, interviews, live reports, and more. New videos are discovered automatically every 30 minutes via the YouTube Data API. Not limited to the official channel.
tips: Filter by category to focus on a specific type of content
Search by title or channel name
Preview videos inline without leaving the app
Newly discovered videos appear automatically — no manual curation needed

views.description: The next 4 BAND-MAID YouTube videos projected to reach a million view milestone, based on yesterday's view rate. Shows projected date and days remaining.
tips: Projections are based on the previous day's view rate — a viral moment can dramatically change the projection
Stream the videos to help push them over the milestone!

views.description: Streaming and social media milestones across YouTube, Spotify, and other platforms. Tracks when BAND-MAID hits significant round-number milestones in followers, views, and streams.
tips: Updated daily
Covers YouTube, Spotify, and social platforms

views.description: Upcoming anniversaries for song releases, member birthdays, live debuts, Okyuji dates, and YouTube video milestones. Always shows what's coming up in the next several weeks.
tips: Great for knowing when to celebrate member birthdays on social media
Song release anniversaries are a good time to stream those tracks
Updated daily with current upcoming anniversaries

views.description: Collection of over 400 BAND-MAID GIFs, optimized for size and load speed. Browse by member or browse all.
tips: GIFs are optimized for fast loading even on mobile
Filter by member to find GIFs of a specific member
Click any GIF to open it full size for easy saving or sharing

views.description: BAND-MAID trivia quiz with questions about songs, videos, streaming stats, and history. A new set of questions is available daily. Questions are drawn from real app data so answers are always current.
tips: Questions are generated from live data so the correct answer for 'most viewed video' reflects current stats
A new quiz is available each day
Explanations are shown after each answer

views.description: All BAND-MAID merchandise from BAND-MAID ONLINE SHOP, Amped Japan, Pony Canyon (USA and Japan), and CDJapan. Aggregated from multiple stores in one place.
tips: Covers multiple stores — compare availability across regions
Links open directly on the store's product page
Updated weekly — newly listed items appear automatically

views.description: The 10 best-performing BAND-MAID YouTube videos for the previous day by view count. A quick daily snapshot of what's trending.
tips: Updated each morning with yesterday's data
A useful indicator of what content is being shared or recommended by YouTube's algorithm that day

views.description: Follower and subscriber counts across BAND-MAID's official social media accounts with direct links to each platform.
tips: Links open the official account on each platform
Updated weekly
Covers YouTube, Spotify, Instagram, X, TikTok, and more

views.description: All BAND-MAID events found via the Ticketmaster API, with direct purchase links. Only overseas shows appear here — Japanese shows are not sold through Ticketmaster. Multiple ticket types (General, VIP) are listed separately when available.
tips: Japan shows will never appear here — they use a different ticketing system
VIP packages appear as separate entries from general admission
Updated daily — new events appear automatically as they're listed on Ticketmaster

views.description: YouTube viewer location data for BAND-MAID's channel, showing 7-day and 28-day geographic breakdowns. Useful for seeing where the fanbase is growing.
tips: Data comes directly from YouTube Analytics
Compare 7-day vs 28-day to spot recent growth trends in specific countries

views.description: RSS feed aggregating BAND-MAID mentions from Google Alerts, YouTube, Reddit, Bluesky, Mastodon, and other social platforms. A live stream of BAND-MAID activity across the web.
tips: Good for catching news and fan activity as it happens
Covers multiple platforms in one feed
Click any item to open the original source

views.description: Interactive Google My Maps showing BAND-MAID Okyuji and Music Video filming locations. Created and maintained by @Simeon from Brazil.
tips: Use the layer controls to show/hide different location types
Click any pin for details about that location
Covers both live performance venues and MV shooting locations worldwide

views.description: Dozens of detailed data reports looking at BAND-MAID statistics from different angles — streaming trends, YouTube performance, historical comparisons, and more. Reports are generated automatically from live data.
tips: New reports are generated daily with current data
Reports are PDF format — use your browser's built-in PDF viewer
A good starting point for deep dives into BAND-MAID data

views.description: Searchable archive of translated Instagram posts from BAND-MAID and members, covering 2014-09-30 to 2025-09-11. Full-text search across all posts.
tips: Use the date filter to narrow to a specific time period
Filter by member to see posts from a specific member
Full-text search works across all post content
This is a static archive — posts after September 2025 are not included

views.description: Searchable archive of translated tweets from BAND-MAID and members, covering 2013-07-19 to 2025-09-10. Over 52,000 records with full-text search.
tips: With 52,000+ records, the search is the best way to find specific topics
Filter by member to see tweets from a specific member
Member color coding makes it easy to scan who said what
This is a static archive — tweets after September 2025 are not included

views.description: Stream count graphs since detailed data collection began — YouTube view history since February 2025, Spotify streams since July 2025, and YouTube comment history since 2014. Visualizes growth trends over time.
tips: Comment history going back to 2014 gives a long-term view of community growth
YouTube and Spotify graphs show day-by-day stream accumulation
Useful for identifying when specific events caused view spikes

views.description: Curated collection of useful BAND-MAID related links — official sites, fan resources, social media, and more.
tips: A good starting point for new fans discovering BAND-MAID's online presence
Covers both official and fan-created resources

views.description: Rank all BAND-MAID songs through pairwise comparisons. Save your progress and resume later. Optionally submit your final ranking to be aggregated across the fanbase.
tips: With 200+ songs, the sort takes time — save often using the Save button
You can resume a saved session at any time
Use keyboard shortcuts (arrow keys) to speed through comparisons
Submit your results to contribute to the fanbase aggregate ranking

views.description: Anonymous feedback form for the BAND-MAID Unofficial app. Leave likes, dislikes, bug reports, feature ideas, or anything else. All feedback is read and appreciated.
tips: Completely anonymous — no account required
Bug reports, feature requests, and general feedback all welcome
You can also reach the developer on the BAND-MAID Dashboard Discord server

views.description: YouTube playlist builder focused on BAND-MAID videos approaching 1 million views. Stream these videos to help push them over the milestone. Shows current view count, daily rate, and projected milestone date for each video.
tips: Play these videos to help BAND-MAID reach more milestones
The progress bar shows how close each video is to 1M
Daily view rate and projected date update every 24 hours
Auto-advances to the next video when one ends

views.description: Custom YouTube playlist builder for all official BAND-MAID videos. Group by type (Music Video, Audio, Live, etc.), add individual videos or entire groups at once, reorder by drag or arrows, save and load named playlists.
tips: Add All adds every video in a group to your playlist at once
Drag the ⠿ handle to reorder, or use ▲▼ arrows
Shuffle randomizes the current playlist order — click multiple times for a different order
Saved playlists are stored in your browser — they persist between sessions
Auto-advances to the next video when one ends; Loop option repeats the playlist

views.description: Custom playlist builder for 4000+ fan-filmed BAND-MAID concert videos. Group by Year, Year+Event, or Channel. Build playlists of your favorite shows or specific events.
tips: Group by Year+Event to find all fan cams from a specific show
Group by Channel to build a playlist from your favorite fan cam creator
With 4000 videos, groups load lazily — expand a group to load its videos
Saved playlists use a separate storage key from the main playlist builder

views.description: Custom playlist builder for 550+ BAND-MAID interview and miscellaneous YouTube videos. Group by Category, Channel, or Year. Build and save playlists of interviews with specific members or outlets.
tips: Group by Category to separate interviews from other content types
Search within the builder to find interviews about a specific topic
Saved playlists persist between sessions

views.description: Custom playlist builder for 26,000+ fan reaction videos to BAND-MAID content. Group by channel or year, search by video title or channel name, and build playlists of your favorite reactors. Channel names always reflect the most recent name used by that channel.
tips: Search works across both video titles and channel names
Channel names are resolved to the most recent name — a channel that rebranded will show its current name across all its videos
Group by Year + sort by Date (oldest first) to follow reactions chronologically as BAND-MAID grew in popularity
Group by Channel to find all videos from a specific reactor
Large groups load 100 videos at a time — click Show More to load additional videos
Saved playlists use a separate storage key from other playlist builders

views.description: 300+ English translations of Japanese BAND-MAID interviews, articles, and lyrics. Filter by member, publication, song, or album. Toggle between English translation, original Japanese, or both side by side.
tips: Use the EN/JP/Both toggle to read the original Japanese alongside the translation
Filter by member to find all interviews featuring a specific member
Filter by song to find articles that mention a specific song
The translator's name and a link to the translation source are shown when available
Lyrics translations are included alongside interview articles

views.description: Custom Spotify playlist builder for all BAND-MAID songs. Group by year or album, sort by Spotify rank or streams, save and load named playlists. Requires Spotify login in your browser for full tracks.
tips: Being logged into Spotify in your browser is required for full tracks
Full tracks confirmed working in Edge and Chrome; other browsers may only play 30-second previews
When a track ends, the next is cued automatically — press play to continue
An AutoHotkey script is available in Fan Tools to automate the play button between tracks
Run this view in its own browser window (not just a tab) when using the AutoHotkey script
